title: The Reverie Opens Under Hidden Shadows
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Kaido, Reverie Delegates, Mjosgard as The Reverie gathers world leaders while hidden powers at Mariejois begin to move.
scene: World leaders gather at Mariejois while the Revolutionary Army and the secret ruler behind the Empty Throne move in the shadows.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Within the Pangaea Castle...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With some disturbances within, the Holy Land is buzzing

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This place isn't as lively as it was before...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: THE SOCIALISING PLAZA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's because of what happened earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How do you feel- resu?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shira- Hoshi- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My bruises have fully healed!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank you very much, mansherry- chan-sama! ♤That ability of yours is so lovely.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ehehe.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FUFFU... the largest princess in the world and the smallest princess in the world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: are meeting face to face.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sorry for being scared of you at first- resu.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There are good humans and bad humans...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...just as there are bad fish- men and good fishmen.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because of your actions, Mjosgard, we were able to resolve that dispute without having to give up what we wanted.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For the next seven days, I will stand alongside Princess Shirahoshi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If the status I was born into can be of any help to you and your people, then it's worth doing so.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does that mean we can beat up anybody with your permission!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ye... yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it's to protect the princesses, I'll take full respond- Blity.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: VIVI- SAMA I'M VERY SORRY!! I SHOULD'VE BEEN STANDING BY YOUR SIDE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Pell... Where's papa?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Earlier... He was given a letter by Marine Admiral Fujitora.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So now he is in a meeting with him and King Riku of Dressrossa....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Someone seems to

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: MEAN- WHILE...

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Celestial Dragon Gate

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: @1 (Entrance to the domain of the gods)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There are three heavily guarded gates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: WEHE HEHE!

dialogue.speaker: Reverie Delegates
dialogue.text: Sorbet kingdom Queen Dowager CONNIE

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hehe hehe hehe...

dialogue.speaker: Reverie Delegates
dialogue.text: Oh, you're sorbet Kingdom's...

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: ...this gate is the celestial dragon gate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Queen Dowager Connie...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the domain of the gods is through this gate.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't let you pass... so please return to the main castle. It's dangerous here!!

dialogue.speaker: Mjosgard
dialogue.text: OWW!! It hurts!! Oonforgivable!! Damn you, mjosgard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Saint Charles, Please calm down!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll open up your wounds if you don't!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will nawt let him get away with dis...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Huh!? What Hap- Pened...!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Open the gates, Saint Charles was injured!! He needs to be treated immediately!!!

dialogue.speaker: Saint Charlos
dialogue.text: OH... CHARLOS!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Are you all right!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard about what happened and was on my way to pick you up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Saint Ros- Ward!!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: FA... FATHER...!!

summary: This section advances the Reverie storyline with 49 dialogue beats. The Reverie looks ceremonial on the surface, but Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionaries turn it into a major political pivot.
